Package neqsim.process.optimization.valuechain

Class NetworkAllocationOptimizer.AllocationResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.optimization.valuechain.NetworkAllocationOptimizer.AllocationResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
NetworkAllocationOptimizer
public static class NetworkAllocationOptimizer.AllocationResult extends Object implements Serializable
Result of scoring or optimizing an allocation.

  • Constructor Details

    • AllocationResult

      public AllocationResult(double[] allocation, double objective, boolean feasible)
      Creates an allocation result.
      Parameters:
      allocation - the per-leg allocation
      objective - the objective value (higher is better)
      feasible - true if the allocation is feasible

  • Method Details

    • getAllocation

      public double[] getAllocation()
      Gets the per-leg allocation.
      Returns:
      a copy of the allocation array

    • getObjective

      public double getObjective()
      Gets the objective value.
      Returns:
      the objective value (higher is better)

    • isFeasible

      public boolean isFeasible()
      Indicates whether the allocation is feasible.
      Returns:
      true if feasible
